app.title: Minecraft: Java Edition now uses SDL3
app.author: ObviouslyFlamer
proposed_tests: Verify SDL3 integration in Minecraft Java Edition
Compare performance with older Minecraft versions
Validate Minecraft Java Edition works with SDL3
